type.en: Report Submission and Electronic Certification Comment
type.fr: Soumission de déclaration et attestation électronique

comments.comment: An error was discovered in caluclating Phosphorus to water discharges during the 2023 NPRI calculations. NPRI QC requested we submit amendments to correct historical reports. Corrections have also been made that have led to us adding Nitrate Ion to our reporting parameters.

comments.comment: While reviewing and updating our NPRI reporting calculations, an error was discovered in the method for calculating Nitrate in water effluent. Consequently this number is being updated. The reduction from prior years is due to decreases in production as well changes in the management of nutrient addition to waterwater treatment and more accurate, current, measurement of Nitrate in Effluent.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Note that published emissions factors are applied against the source tested total particulate matter data. Variability in particulate emissions is normal when so many sources are included and depends largely on the efficiency of the pollution control equipment. For example, leading up to a shutdown in which PCE is cleaned emissions will be higher than following the shutdown maintenance.

comments.comment: Note that published emissions factors are applied against the source tested total particulate matter data. Variability in particulate emissions is normal when so many sources are included and depends largely on the efficiency of the pollution control equipment. For example, leading up to a shutdown in which PCE is cleaned emissions will be higher than following the shutdown maintenance.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Annual variation from timing of lagoon dredging events.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Further research this year, found an emissions factor with good statistical reliability that we could apply to estimate Pyrene in wood ash. This was not previously accounted for.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Further research this year led to a decision to change the emissions factor associated with the Kraft Recovery boiler based on analysis of statistical reliability. This led to using a higher emissions factor and a higher emission reported.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The arsenic concentration in treated effluent to the river was based on 2020 data for the last few years. Further testing was done in 2024 and all came back below the detection limit. Therefore zero discharge to water was reported for 2024.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The Cadmium in direct discharge to water was previously calculated based off of measurements from 2020. Additional testing took place in 2024 which recorded lower numbers - most below the detection limit. Therefore the annualized concentration used to calculate discharge to water was considerably lower in 2024.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Additional research this year led to the finding of an emissions factor with good statistical reliability that was used to estimate manganese in landfilled ash. this source of manganese was not previously accounted for.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: For releases to water bodies this year, the amount has dropped to zero. This is based on updating the 2023 source measurements, to the 2024 source measurements where all readings were below the detection limit.
